offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual formatting causes delays in reimbursements. We convert raw expense reports into formatted reimbursement summaries instead of manual formatting of expense reports.
problem: Manual formatting of expense reports leads to delays in reimbursements.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows

Engage in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for expense reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
